title: Everything You Need to Know About PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text:
Imagine you're a digital creator in Nigeria trying to sell ebooks online. You can't use PayPal due to geographic restrictions, but you've got a valuable product to share with your audience. The problem is, without a conventional payment processor like PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, you can't collect payment or send automated digital product delivery. This is where a crypto store, like the one powered by Web3 Wallet Connect, comes in – no PayPal required."

    { "heading": "What This Actually Is and Why It Matters
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated digital product delivery, also known as instant automated delivery, is a game-changer for creators like you. It's a way to send digital products, like ebooks or courses, directly to customers after they make a payment, without needing a manual intervention. This means you can focus on creating more content, while your sales take care of themselves. But what exactly is involved in making this happen, and why does it matter for your business?
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind automated digital product delivery involves a few key components. First, there's the payment processor, like NOWPayments, which handles the crypto transactions. Next, there's the webhook, a small piece of code that listens for payment confirmations and triggers the delivery of your digital product. Finally, there's the Core Shop Engine, which automates the entire process, from payment to delivery. When a customer makes a payment, the webhook is triggered, and the Core Shop Engine sends the digital product directly to the customer's email.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This automated digital product delivery solution is built for creators like you, who are stuck with manual fulfillment processes and can't use conventional payment processors. It's perfect for digital creators in countries with restricted payment options, like Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and many others. With this solution, you can finally unlock the potential of your digital products and start selling them without the hassle of manual delivery.
Digital product delivery can be automated without relying on conventional payment processors.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Admin Dashboard provides real-time visibility into your store's automated operation without requiring you to monitor it continuously. Every transaction appears in the log within seconds of processing. Order statuses are updated automatically as each step of the delivery pipeline completes: payment confirmed, receipt generated, delivery link sent. If any step fails — a webhook that did not fire, an email that bounced, a transaction that confirmed but was below the expected amount — the dashboard flags it for review. You check the dashboard once a day and handle any flagged exceptions. The automated system handles everything else. This is the operational model of a professional digital store: automation handles the routine, you handle the exceptions.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know the components involved in automated digital product delivery, it's time to take action. First, sign up for Web3 Wallet Connect, which offers frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. This will enable your customers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrencies. Next, set up your shop using the Core Shop Engine, and connect it to NOWPayments for seamless payment processing. Finally, configure the webhook to trigger the delivery of your digital product after a payment is made. With these steps, you'll be able to automate your digital product delivery and start selling without the hassle of manual fulfillment.
How does automated digital product delivery work?

Automated digital delivery works through a webhook — an HTTP notification that NOWPayments sends to your Core Shop Engine endpoint when a payment confirms on-chain. The engine receives the webhook, reads the payment amount and transaction hash from the payload, verifies the amount matches the order total, confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain directly, then generates a PDF receipt and sends a delivery email with a time-limited download link to the buyer's email address. The entire sequence runs server-side with no user interface and no manual steps. It completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation in almost all cases. If any step fails, the Admin Dashboard flags the order for manual review so nothing slips through.
A webhook is a small piece of code that listens for payment confirmations and triggers delivery.

Your Action Checklist

To automate your digital product delivery, follow these steps: sign up for Web3 Wallet Connect, set up your shop using the Core Shop Engine, connect it to NOWPayments for payment processing, configure the webhook to trigger delivery, and test your setup to ensure seamless payment and delivery. With these steps, you'll be able to automate your digital product delivery and start selling without the hassle of manual fulfillment.
The Core Shop Engine automates the delivery of digital products after a payment is made.
